title: Crispy French Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and crispy chicken dish inspired by North African cuisine with the addition of French flair.
instructions: Season chicken breasts with tagine spice mix.
Heat olive oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear chicken breasts until browned on both sides, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Transfer skillet to the oven and cook for 15-20 minutes or until chicken is cooked through.
Meanwhile, toast baguette slices in the oven for 5-7 minutes or until crispy.
In a small pan, heat a little olive oil over medium heat.
Add minced garlic and cook until fragrant, about 1 minute.
Add crispy fried onions and cook for an additional minute.
To assemble the dish, place a seared chicken breast on each plate.
Top with toasted baguette slices, garlic-onion mixture, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
